body_txt: The character may need to take a Fallen-on-Hard-Times Job and need to wear an animal costume to try to get customers to come into a store. A professional ice skater who's fallen on hard times might need to do Ice Capades, a kids' show, and dress like a dinosaur. A character might be getting married, or he's a Frat Bro joining a college fraternity, so his pals force him to wear the animal suit as a hazing. A character may need a costume for a masquerade or a Halloween party. Having a character get a job that requires such a costume is a common trope in Anime . If a character, or group of characters, is forced to take on an odd job, it will involve wearing one of these. May overlap with Dreaded Kids' Party Entertainer Job . Compare Goofy Suit .
